creator: amistry@am-productions.biz
text:
There currently isn't a switch to disable the documentation 
installing.  It's on the hplip team's To-Do list as of today, but 
it's not a high priority.  My autoconf fu isn't very good so I'm 
probably not going to attempt the modifications.  Patches are always 
welcome though.
-- 
Anish Mistry
amistry@am-productions.biz
AM Productions http://am-productions.biz/
